title: Implement fail-fast mechanisms and detailed state monitoring tools
description: Add fail-fast checks in sim core, RenodeServer, Zephyr drivers for invalid states/transitions. Add debug dump tool (e.g. sim.dump_state(), CLI --debug-dump) for fast debug/fix/retry. Follow spec for observability.
close_reason: Enhanced logging, metrics, state monitoring, fail-fast checks, Renode/Zephyr tool integration and tests implemented. All tests passing.
